prs.title: Ch/sm 335 - New /assessment page
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: A brand-new /assessment page with 2103 custom lines across 31 files, introducing a full React Flow-based visualization with multiple node types, hooks, server actions, schema changes, and navigation — a major feature constituting a significant architectural addition to the platform.

prs.title: fixes portfolio company table
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 88 lines across 3 files fixing and enhancing the portfolio company table, with Jason contributing meaningful query-level logic (selecting parentGapId, excluding child gaps) alongside Chris's UI fixes — a modest but multi-layered bug fix.

prs.title: fix: HubSpot sync critical fixes
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: Only 3 custom lines changed across 3 files, representing targeted critical hotfixes to the HubSpot sync service and admin UI with minimal scope.

prs.title: Pass appEnv to sync UI; fix lastSync check
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 11 lines across 4 files passing appEnv to the sync UI and fixing a lastSync check — a small but purposeful configuration and logic correction touching multiple layers.

stories.name: New Assessment Experience
stories.rationale: Introduced a dedicated /assessment page as a core new feature of the platform's business readiness evaluation flow.

stories.name: Portfolio Company Table Fix
stories.rationale: Resolved display issues in the portfolio company table to improve usability for users managing multiple companies.

stories.name: HubSpot Integration Stability
stories.rationale: Addressed critical HubSpot sync bugs and improved environment configuration to ensure reliable CRM data synchronization.
